name: StatsCardGrid
description: A responsive grid of metric/KPI cards showing statistics with labels, values, change indicators, and optional trend direction. Ideal for dashboard summaries and overview sections.

visual.description: Responsive grid of cards, each showing a metric label, large value, and optional change percentage with up/down indicator. Cards have subtle borders, hover shadow, and color-coded change indicators (green for positive, red for negative).
visual.layout: responsive grid of metric cards (2-4 columns)

props.name: stats
props.description: Array of stat objects with label, value, change, changeLabel, and trend ('up' | 'down' | 'neutral')

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in the grid

props.name: title
props.description: Optional section title above the grid
